headline: Packaging, Forest Products Face Lackluster Demand, Weak Volumes, BofA Says

headline: Mondelez International (MDLZ) Leans Into Recycled Packaging Following A Narrative Of Undervalued Growth
summary: LyondellBasell’s new flexible packaging solution for Marabou chocolate bars, developed with Mondelez International (MDLZ), Amcor and Taghleef Industries, introduces 75% recycled-content packaging aligned with emerging European recycled-content and packaging waste requirements. See our latest analysis for Mondelez International. For investors, Mondelez International’s recent packaging move comes as the stock trades at US$59.86, with a 1-day share price return of 1.75% and a year-to-date share...

headline: Is Mondelez (MDLZ) Quietly Reframing Its Brand Narrative Through High‑Recycled Chocolate Packaging?
summary: LyondellBasell recently announced that Mondelez International, together with Amcor and Taghleef Industries, has introduced new Marabou chocolate bar packaging in Europe using CirculenRevive polymers with 100% attributed recycled content via an ISCC PLUS-certified mass balance approach, enabling packaging sourced from 75% recycled content. This collaboration not only tackles hard-to-recycle mixed plastic waste in food packaging, but also helps Mondelez prepare for anticipated European Union...
